name: &BThe Temple of the Gnomes&n
description:
You are in the Temple of the Gnomes, there are several equipments
over the walls. There is something on the left side of the temple,
it seems to be a laboratory. You see paintings of the God of Gnomes called
by them as Slinky. The room is illuminated by torches.
   The exit to the Temple Street is to the North.
